// Xafid xogta adigoo isticmaalaya furaha iyadoo la adeegsanayo habka CBC.
Furaha la bixiyay wuxuu leeyahay dherer ku filan (>= 64 bytes) labadaba AES iyo DES algorithms.
Kaliya dooro hal algorithm si aad u hirgeliso oo isticmaal bilowga furaha la bixiyay ee ku habboon dhererka loo baahan yahay.
Ha dooran algorithm-ka iyadoo lagu saleynayo dhererka furaha.
Soo celi xogta la xafiday, IV (vector-ka bilowga), iyo furaha loo isticmaalay xafididda.

- key: Bytes-ka lagu sameynayo furaha xafididda.
- data: Xogta la xafiday.

- Xogta la xafiday, IV, iyo furaha loo isticmaalay xafididda. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {

		<age>25</age>

	<student>
		<username>bob_smith</username>
		<password>bspassword</password>

		<citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
		<age>22</age>
	</student>
</students>

@param username Magaca isticmaale ee ardayga la raadinayo.
@param password Erayga sirta ah ee ardayga la raadinayo.

@return Tuplada (name, age, citizenship) haddii ardayga la helo. Haddii kale, soo celi xarfo madhan. */
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {
